name: DLF Cyber City Topographical Survey
survey_requirements: High-density topographical mapping of the new Phase 2 extension block including all underground utilities.
description: A comprehensive topographical survey required for the new extension block in DLF Phase 2. This includes identifying all underground utility lines to avoid conflicts during the foundation phase. The client expects high-accuracy deliverables in AutoCAD format.

name: Navi Mumbai Airport Expansion Boundary Scan
client_address: NMIA Site Office, Panvel, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 410206
survey_requirements: Verify exact perimeter coordinates for the new eastern terminal expansion using drone photogrammetry.
description: Drone-based photogrammetry and boundary verification for the proposed eastern terminal expansion. High precision is required due to proximity to existing active runways. Requires daily progress reports.

name: TCS Campus Drone Mapping
client_address: SIPCOT IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 603103
survey_requirements: Create a 3D twin of the entire 70-acre campus for facility management purposes.
description: Full 3D digital twin creation for the entire 70-acre TCS Siruseri IT Park campus. The deliverable will be integrated into their internal facility management platform. As-built surveys of major structures are also required.

name: Reliance Refinery Pipeline Route
survey_requirements: Locate and map existing underground utilities along the proposed 5km pipeline expansion route.
description: Critical underground utility mapping along the proposed 5km pipeline route within the refinery premises. Must identify all existing high-pressure lines, electrical conduits, and water mains before trenching begins.

name: Bangalore Metro Phase 3 Alignment
survey_requirements: Alignment verification for the new Phase 3 elevated corridor pillars.
description: Alignment verification and construction staking for the new elevated metro corridor pillars. Tight tolerances are mandated by BMRCL. Daily structural monitoring during initial works is also needed.

name: Godrej Properties Residential Layout
survey_requirements: 15-acre land parcel survey for a new luxury residential township including contour mapping.
description: Initial land parcel survey encompassing 15 acres for a new luxury township in Hinjewadi. Deliverables include a 0.5m contour map, existing tree locations, and verification of original land boundary records (Satbara).

name: Pune IT Park Layout Survey
survey_requirements: Complete land parcel boundary verification and topographical mapping for the proposed 22-acre IT park in Hinjewadi Phase 3. Client requires AutoCAD deliverables with 0.5m contour intervals and all existing utility markings.
description: Piramal Realty is developing a new IT park in Hinjewadi Phase 3 and requires a comprehensive topographical and boundary survey. The 22-acre site needs high-accuracy mapping to support the project's master planning phase. The client has shared satellite imagery and expects the first deliverable within 6 weeks of mobilisation.

name: Bandra Kurla Complex High-Rise Survey
client_address: Lodha Excelus, Apollo Mills Compound, Mahalaxmi, Mumbai 400011
survey_requirements: Basic topographical survey for a proposed commercial high-rise in BKC.
description: Lodha Group inquired about a basic topographical survey for a new plot acquired in BKC. Requirements are very preliminary and no budget has been discussed. Just logging this as a fresh lead.

name: Nagpur Ring Road Alignment Study
survey_requirements: Drone photogrammetry and topographical survey along the 38km proposed ring road alignment around Nagpur. Cross-sections at every 50m and full corridor mapping up to 100m on each side required for DPR preparation.
description: MSRDC is in the DPR stage for a new 38km ring road around Nagpur city. They require a detailed topographical survey and drone photogrammetry along the full alignment corridor for the project feasibility and design report. The engagement is time-critical as the DPR submission deadline is end of August.

name: Hyderabad Pharma SEZ Site Assessment
client_address: Aurobindo Pharma Ltd., Plot No. 2, Maitrivihar, Ameerpet, Hyderabad 500038
survey_requirements: As-built survey and underground utility mapping for a 65-acre pharma SEZ plot in Genome Valley, Hyderabad. All existing structures, drainage networks, and underground electrical/water lines must be documented for expansion planning.
description: Aurobindo Pharma is planning an expansion of their existing pharma SEZ in Genome Valley. Before design work can begin, a complete as-built and utility survey of the existing 65-acre campus is needed to understand the current site conditions. The client has discussed budgets informally and is looking to engage a reputable surveying firm in the next few weeks.

name: Kolkata Riverfront Bathymetric Study
client_address: Unnayan Bhavan, Salt Lake, Kolkata, West Bengal 700091
survey_requirements: Underwater profiling of the Hooghly riverbed near the Howrah bridge structural supports.
description: Specialized bathymetric and underwater topographical survey of the Hooghly riverbed near the Howrah bridge supports. Data will be used for structural integrity assessment and future dredging planning.
